title: “Bizzare attacks against me”: Candace Owens alleges Ben Shapiro lawsuits as Laura Loomer responds with strong criticism
summary_full: Candace Owens and Laura Loomer are in a heated public dispute, with Owens accusing Ben Shapiro of legal attacks and Loomer challenging her claims. The conflict includes allegations about lawsuits, private data access, and media influence. Other figures like Ana Kasparian are also involved. Many claims remain unverified, making the situation complex and still developing.
